title: Audit and Fix Frank Bot's Claudia API Integration
description: Frank_bot's Claudia integration is incomplete and has missing operations. Do a full pass against the Claudia OpenAPI spec to ensure all relevant endpoints are wired up correctly, with clear action descriptions so GPT picks the right one.
content:
# Audit and Fix Frank Bot's Claudia API Integration

## Context

Frank_bot integrates with the Claudia API to let users manage repos, chat about features, and execute prompts. The integration was built incrementally and has fallen behind the Claudia API — several endpoints are missing from frank_bot, and GPT picks the wrong action when the right one isn't available.

## The Triggering Bug

A user asked frank_bot to "execute the fix-bat-ghcr-auth-durability prompt on claudia." Frank_bot reported "Internal Server Error when dispatching the prompt." Claudia API logs showed:

```
POST /api/repos/d6c51111-.../prompts HTTP/1.1  404 Not Found
```

Frank_bot called `claudiaPromptCreate` (generate prompt from chat, requires chatId) instead of the correct `claudiaPromptExecute` (execute existing prompt, requires promptId). This happened because **`claudiaPromptExecute` doesn't exist in frank_bot's OpenAI spec** — it was never registered. GPT had no choice but to use the only prompt action available.

## Full Audit: What's Missing

Compare frank_bot's current Claudia operations against what the Claudia API actually offers. The Claudia OpenAPI spec is at `~/dev/claudia/openapi.yml`.

### Currently Registered in Frank Bot's OpenAI Spec

| operationId | Frank Bot Path | Claudia Endpoint | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| `claudiaApiLearn` | `/actions/claudia/api/learn` | N/A (local) | OK |
| `claudiaRepoList` | `/actions/claudia/repos` | `GET /api/repos` | OK |
| `claudiaChatCreate` | `/actions/claudia/chat/create` | `POST /api/repos/{id}/chats` | OK |
| `claudiaChatList` | `/actions/claudia/repos/{id}/chats` | `GET /api/repos/{id}/chats` | OK |
| `claudiaChatGet` | `/actions/claudia/repos/{id}/chats/{cid}` | `GET /api/repos/{id}/chats/{cid}` | OK |
| `claudiaChatSend` | `/actions/claudia/repos/{id}/chats/{cid}/message` | `POST /api/repos/{id}/chats/{cid}/messages` | OK |
| `claudiaChatEnd` | `/actions/claudia/repos/{id}/chats/{cid}/end` | `POST /api/repos/{id}/chats/{cid}/end` | OK |
| `claudiaPromptCreate` | `/actions/claudia/repos/{id}/prompts/create` | `POST /api/repos/{id}/prompts` | OK but description is ambiguous |
| `claudiaQueueGet` | `/actions/claudia/repos/{id}/queue` | `GET /api/repos/{id}/queue` | OK |
| `claudiaExecutionList` | `/actions/claudia/executions` | `GET /api/executions` | OK |
| `claudiaExecutionGet` | `/actions/claudia/executions/{eid}` | `GET /api/executions/{eid}` | OK |

### MISSING — Must Add

| operationId | Frank Bot Path | Claudia Endpoint | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| `claudiaPromptList` | `/actions/claudia/repos/{id}/prompts` | `GET /api/repos/{id}/prompts` | List all prompts for a repo |
| `claudiaPromptGet` | `/actions/claudia/repos/{id}/prompts/{pid}` | `GET /api/repos/{id}/prompts/{pid}` | Get prompt details/content |
| `claudiaPromptExecute` | `/actions/claudia/repos/{id}/prompts/{pid}/execute` | `POST /api/repos/{id}/prompts/{pid}/execute` | Execute an existing prompt file |
| `claudiaPromptQueue` | `/actions/claudia/repos/{id}/prompts/{pid}/queue` | `POST /api/repos/{id}/prompts/{pid}/queue` | Queue prompt for PRD generation |

### NICE TO HAVE — Consider Adding

| operationId | Claudia Endpoint | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `claudiaRepoGet` | `GET /api/repos/{id}` | Get single repo details |
| `claudiaBlockedTasks` | `GET /api/blocked-tasks` | List tasks needing human attention |
| `claudiaConcernsList` | `GET /api/repos/{id}/concerns` | List Renfield code patrol findings |
| `claudiaHealthGet` | `GET /api/health` | Check Claudia API health (now includes GHCR status) |
| `claudiaStatsGet` | `GET /api/stats` | Get usage statistics |

## What to Fix

### 1. Add Missing Actions to the OpenAI Spec (`openapi/spec.json`)

Add all four MISSING operations above. Each needs:
- A path under `/actions/claudia/...`
- An `operationId` following the `claudia{Noun}{Verb}` convention
- Clear, unambiguous `description` and `summary`
- Correct parameters and request body schemas

### 2. Add Missing Client Methods (if needed)

Check `services/claudia_client.py` — it already has `execute_prompt()`, `queue_prompt()`, `list_prompts()`, and `get_prompt()` methods. These just need to be wired up to action handlers.

### 3. Add Missing Action Handlers

Check `actions/claudia.py` — it already has `execute_claudia_prompt_action()`, `list_claudia_prompts_action()`, and `get_claudia_prompt_action()`. These just need to be registered in the route/dispatch table.

### 4. Wire Up the Route Dispatch

Check `server/routes.py` or wherever frank_bot maps operationIds to action functions. Ensure all new operations are registered.

### 5. Make Action Descriptions Unambiguous

This is critical for GPT to pick the right action. Update descriptions:

- **`claudiaPromptCreate`**: "Generate a NEW prompt from a completed chat conversation. Use this after ending a chat to turn the discussion into executable code changes. Requires chat_id."
- **`claudiaPromptExecute`**: "Execute an EXISTING prompt file from the repo's prompts/ directory. Use this when the user wants to run a specific named prompt. Requires prompt_id. Call claudiaPromptList first to see available prompts."
- **`claudiaPromptList`**: "List all available prompts for a repository. Shows prompt names, status, and descriptions. Use this to find which prompts exist before executing one."
- **`claudiaPromptGet`**: "Get the full details and content of a specific prompt. Use this to inspect what a prompt will do before executing it."
- **`claudiaPromptQueue`**: "Queue a prompt for PRD generation (converts prompt into task stories). This is the legacy flow — prefer claudiaPromptExecute for direct execution."

### 6. Improve Error Reporting

In `actions/claudia.py`, when the Claudia API returns an error, report it specifically:
- 404 → "Prompt/repo/chat not found" (not "Internal Server Error")
- 409 → "A prompt is already queued for this repo"
- 400 → "Prompt is not in 'ready' status" or "Prompt is blocked"
- 500 → "Claudia API internal error"

The current behavior of reporting all errors as "Internal Server Error" makes debugging impossible.

### 7. Add Pre-flight Validation

In `execute_claudia_prompt_action()`, before calling `client.execute_prompt()`:
1. Call `client.list_prompts(repo_id)` to verify the prompt exists
2. Check the prompt status is `ready`
3. If not found, return a helpful message: "Prompt 'X' not found in repo Y. Available prompts: A, B, C"

Similarly, in `create_claudia_prompt_action()`, verify the chat_id exists and is in `completed` status before attempting to create the prompt.

## Files to Modify

- `openapi/spec.json` — Add missing operations with clear descriptions
- `actions/claudia.py` — Verify all action handlers exist (they likely do already)
- `server/routes.py` — Wire up new operationIds to action handlers
- `services/claudia_client.py` — Verify all client methods exist (they likely do already)
- `instructions_for_chatgpt.txt` — Update the Claudia workflow section to mention prompt listing/execution

## Reference: Claudia API Source of Truth

The canonical Claudia API spec is at `~/dev/claudia/openapi.yml`. When in doubt about endpoint shapes, request/response schemas, or auth requirements, read that file.

All Claudia API requests require `X-API-Key` header. Frank_bot's `ClaudiaClient` already handles this via Vault secret `secret/frank-bot/claudia`.

## Testing

1. Ask frank_bot: "what prompts does claudia have for the claudia repo?" — should call `claudiaPromptList`
2. Ask frank_bot: "execute the fix-bat-ghcr-auth-durability prompt on claudia" — should call `claudiaPromptExecute` (NOT `claudiaPromptCreate`)
3. Ask frank_bot: "show me the earshot query prompt" — should call `claudiaPromptGet`
4. Ask frank_bot: "create a prompt from our chat about the new feature" — should call `claudiaPromptCreate` with chat_id
5. Verify error messages are specific when things fail (not generic "Internal Server Error")
6. Check Claudia API logs to confirm the correct endpoints are being hit
